blended.narrative: Sommet Saint-Sauveur is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.0 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,061 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
